# ArcFlow

> The World Model database — spatial-temporal, confidence-scored, embedded. Runs in browser (WASM), Node.js, Python, Rust, Docker. No server needed. Space and time are first-class dimensions; every fact carries an observation class (observed/inferred/predicted) and confidence score.

## Try instantly (zero install)

Open https://arcflow.dev/engine in your browser. Paste any query. Persistent storage.

## Install

```
npm install arcflow
```

## 5 essential patterns

```typescript
import { open, openInMemory, ArcflowError } from 'arcflow'

// 1. Create and query (no server, no connection)
const db = openInMemory()
db.mutate("CREATE (n:Person {name: 'Alice', age: 30})")
db.query("MATCH (n:Person) RETURN n.name, n.age")

// 2. Parameters (prevents injection)
db.query("MATCH (n {id: $id}) RETURN n", { id: 'p1' })

// 3. Algorithms (no projection setup)
db.query("CALL algo.pageRank()")

// 4. Vector search (built-in, no separate service)
db.mutate("CREATE VECTOR INDEX idx FOR (n:Doc) ON (n.embedding) OPTIONS {dimensions: 1536, similarity: 'cosine'}")
db.query("CALL algo.vectorSearch('idx', $vec, 10)", { vec: JSON.stringify([0.1, 0.2]) })

// 5. Persistence (WAL-journaled, survives crashes)
const persistent = open('./data/graph')
```

## Why not Neo4j/Memgraph

- Runs in browser (WASM) — zero install, arcflow.dev/engine
- No server needed — in-process like SQLite
- `openInMemory()` for testing — no Docker, no teardown
- Algorithms: `CALL algo.pageRank()` — no GDS projection lifecycle
- Vector search built in — no separate Pinecone/Qdrant
- Window functions: LAG, LEAD, STDDEV_POP, PERCENT_RANK
- Live views: `CREATE LIVE VIEW` — incremental, auto-maintained
- CLI binary: `arcflow query '...'` — shell-native agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) use this
- MCP server: `npx arcflow-mcp` — cloud chat UIs only (ChatGPT, Claude.ai, Gemini web)

## API

- `openInMemory()` → ArcflowDB
- `open(dataDir)` → ArcflowDB (persistent)
- `db.query(cypher, params?)` → { columns, rows, rowCount, computeMs, gqlstatus() }
- `db.mutate(cypher, params?)` → MutationResult
- `db.batchMutate(queries[])` → number
- `db.subscribe(query, handler, opts?)` → LiveQuery (cancel())
- `db.cursor(query, params?, pageSize?)` → QueryCursor
- `row.get('column')` → string | number | boolean | null (typed)
- `ArcflowError` → { code, category, suggestion }
- `@arcflow/react` → useQuery(db, q, params), useLiveQuery(db, q)

## GQL / WorldCypher (ISO/IEC 39075 GQL) — 100% openCypher TCK (3881/3881)

CREATE, MATCH, MERGE, SET, DELETE, DETACH DELETE, REMOVE,
WITH, UNWIND, WHERE, RETURN, ORDER BY, LIMIT,
OPTIONAL MATCH, AS OF, CONTAINS, STARTS WITH,
CREATE VECTOR INDEX, CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX,
CREATE CONSTRAINT ON :L(p) ASSERT UNIQUE,
CREATE CONSTRAINT ON :L(p) ASSERT PRIMARY KEY,
IS LABELED :Label, ELEMENT_ID(n),
RETURN * NEXT WHEN/THEN/ELSE/END,
START TRANSACTION [READ ONLY | READ WRITE], COMMIT, ROLLBACK,
CALL algo.pageRank(), CALL algo.louvain(), CALL algo.vectorSearch(),
CALL algo.nearestNodes(), CALL algo.objectsInFrustum(), CALL spatial.raycast(),
CALL db.stats(), CALL db.schema(), CALL db.help(), CALL db.spatialMetadata(),
CALL db.gpuStatus(), CALL dbms.gpuThresholds(),
CALL db.storageMode(), CALL db.warmCsr(), CALL db.csrStats(), CALL db.denseStore(),
CALL db.parallelConfig(), CALL db.executionContext(), CALL db.otelPolicy(),
CALL db.auth.whoami(), CALL db.auth.policies(), CALL db.auth.createApiKey(),
CALL arcflow.session.open(), CALL arcflow.session.list(), CALL arcflow.session.close(),
CALL arcflow.workflow.create(), CALL arcflow.workflow.run(), CALL arcflow.workflow.cancel(),
CALL arcflow.workflow.retryStep(),
CALL arcflow.scene.toUsda(), CALL arcflow.scene.frustumQuery(), CALL arcflow.scene.lineOfSight(),
CALL arcflow.replication.contract(), CALL arcflow.replication.walTailing(),
CALL arcflow.skills.export(), CALL arcflow.skills.import(),
CALL arcflow.ontology.subtypes(), CALL arcflow.ontology.ancestors(),
LIVE MATCH, LIVE CALL, CREATE LIVE VIEW

## PostgreSQL wire protocol (SQL tooling bridge)

```bash
arcflow --pg 5432          # connect psql, Grafana, DBeaver, pgAdmin, ORMs
```

Queries are WorldCypher (GQL), not SQL. The wire protocol is transport-level only.
See docs/guides/sql-to-gql.mdx for the full adoption path.

## Common errors

- `EXPECTED_KEYWORD` → query syntax wrong, check MATCH/CREATE/MERGE
- `UNKNOWN_PROCEDURE` → run `CALL db.procedures()` to see available
- `DB_CLOSED` → called query after db.close()

## Integration recipe

See docs/guides/agent-quickstart.mdx for the 10-step integration guide.

## Guides (stable)

- docs/guides/data-quality.mdx — live DQ with CREATE LIVE VIEW, batch==delta equivalence (Z-set algebra), pipeline prune, drill-through, BI vs ML infrastructure gap
- docs/guides/code-intelligence.mdx — codebase as a live graph: symbols, calls, imports, git commits, blast-radius analysis via impactSubgraph()
- docs/guides/sql-to-gql.mdx — PostgreSQL wire protocol adoption path: connect psql/DBeaver/Grafana, then migrate to native GQL
- docs/guides/filesystem-workspace.mdx — persistent workspace for multi-session and multi-agent workflows

## Full reference

See AGENTS.md for complete API + WorldCypher syntax.
See llms-full.txt for every procedure and pattern.
